neededBricks.whyNeeded: Provides the account 360 and whitespace model.
Maintains contacts and buyer relationships tied to the account.

Provides the live sales-console and opportunity workspace.

neededBricks.whyNeeded: Provides guided methodology, sales path, and coaching workflows.
Coordinates SME engagement and deal collaboration.
Provides enablement, playbooks, and content distribution.
Supports pipeline, forecasting, and quota review.
Supports incentive and commission-linked performance workflows.

interfaces.name: Revenue Cloud Workspace

interfaces.name: Revenue APIs and Events

neededBricks.whyNeeded: Defines catalog and bundle structure for CPQ workflows.
Applies configuration constraints and guided bundle logic.
Applies pricing, discount, and commercial policy control.
Generates the quote and proposal workflow.
Turns approved offers into contract and legal workflows.
Runs billing, invoicing, renewals, and subscription changes.
